violations.description: Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --A sanitizer solution for cleaning purposes was not available at the time of inspection.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Single use cups were stored on the floor.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Secondary container of poisonous or toxic material was not clearly identified to indicated contents. A chemical spray bottle was not labeled near the ice machine.
